design_philosophy: Ecosia-style simplicity with a calm, tactile nature-inspired aesthetic. This is a mobile-first companion app for pet tracking. Emphasizes warm earth tones, rounded pebble-like shapes, and thumb-friendly navigation. The UI should feel like a serene, highly organized journal rather than a clinical medical tool.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Mobile-first one-column layout natively, expanding to a Bento 'Control Room' dense grid on desktop (md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4).
spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Generous organic padding. Use p-6 or p-8 inside cards to avoid text collision with borders.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Pebble-like softness. Use rounded-2xl (16px) or rounded-3xl (24px) for main containers and cards.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid border-[#E9E3D3] on cards to define edges softly without heavy shadows.

components.animal_selector: Top sticky navigation pill or glassmorphic segmented control. Must clearly indicate whether Zelda (Dog) or Maddie (Cat) is currently active.
components.cards: Flat background with 1px soft border (border-[#E9E3D3]). No generic heavy drop shadows. Hover states should slightly lift (-translate-y-1) with a soft diffuse shadow.
components.buttons: Fully rounded (rounded-full) for primary CTAs like 'Start Walk' or 'Add Log'. Background #4A7C59 with white text.
components.charts: Recharts for weight tracking. Use monotoneX for smooth, natural curves. Stroke color #4A7C59, fill gradient from #4A7C59 (20% opacity) to transparent.
components.vet_calendar: Horizontal scrolling date list for quick access, or small inline calendar. Use Shadcn calendar customized with warm nature colors.
components.ai_scan_button: Prominent floating action button (FAB) or large card with camera icon, text 'Analyser un document'.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI inputs heavily customized to have rounded-xl, border-[#E9E3D3], focus:ring-[#4A7C59] and focus:border-[#4A7C59].

nature_background.description: Subtle leaf pattern for header background or empty states

media.icons: lucide-react for all icons. Stroke width 1.5 for a delicate, organic feel.

animations.transitions: framer-motion for page transitions and tabs. Use gentle spring animations (stiffness: 300, damping: 30).
animations.micro_interactions: Scale down slightly on click (active:scale-95) for buttons to make them feel tactile.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first dashboard handling two states: Zelda (Dog) and Maddie (Cat). All data/cards should react to the active animal.
Implement Shadcn UI but override default styles to match the 'Organic & Earthy' archetype (no default Vercel-like borders or shadows).
Ensure all text is in French as requested ('Tableau de bord', 'Rations', 'Fichiers Vétérinaires', 'Poids', 'Balades').
Use Recharts for the weight tracking component.
Create a GPS/Pedometer card specifically shown when Zelda is selected.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements for robust testing.
Use the provided Unsplash URLs for the pet avatars to bring the dashboard to life.
